title: cactus missouriensis var. robustior
intro: Cactus missouriensis var. robustior, also known as the robust Utah prickly pear, is a variety of the Missouri prickly pear cactus that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other antioxidants. The health benefits of the robust Utah prickly pear cactus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing protection against sun damage and UV radiation. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's pads can be harvested and used to make ointments, salves, and gels that can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
